hero.title: Building at the Intersection of Capital, Technology, and Social Impact
hero.subtitle: With 4 graduate degrees including two from Colorado State University, United States of America, I work at the intersection of finance, entrepreneurship, sustainability, and technology to build ventures, analyze opportunities, and support projects that create measurable economic and social impact.
